name: resilienceOS
description: AI resilience agent for neighborhood environmental crisis preparedness

commands.name: assess
commands.description: Ingest forecast, infrastructure and population profile to produce risk and readiness scores.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Generate 24h/6h/1h action plans, task assignments, routes and materials checklist.

commands.name: drill
commands.description: Evaluate drill compliance, missed steps, and produce a corrected template.

commands.name: inbox
commands.description: Cluster social/media snippets and output escalation decisions.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain generated outputs in plain language with assumptions and evidence references.

commands.name: simulate
commands.description: Predict neighborhood segment impact from hypothetical flood scenarios.
